stopConditions: Any candidate, fixture, engine-contract, verification, manifest, prompt, selector, or publication-state integration change after this review invalidates this digest-bound evidence and requires a new independent review run.
Any later reviewer disagreement or editorial rejection blocks publication of the whole immutable batch.
notes: Independent final refrozen-seal Orchid review passed against the exact 2ea7c496 manifest. All 620 frozen fixtures and 744 independently authored fresh probes produced the expected real-engine outcomes across all 24 candidates. Fresh probes separately covered NUL and literal U+FFFD in opener info, NUL-only and NUL-plus-visible bodies, literal U+FFFD bodies, equivalent fences, longer closers, language tags, CRLF/CR-only line endings, blockquote/list containers, fence-looking literal final lines, invisible-only content, parser lookalikes, exact Level 2 anatomy, and prose-neutral variants. No target/teaching-example or prior-bank collision remained. Across 256 seeds and 48 turns, every new Level 2 variant was reachable by turn 5 with no adjacent-family, duplicate-turn, or determinism violation. The state-aware 9,129-test full suite, focused 838-test regressions, typecheck, production build, and prepublication gate passed with no blocking findings.
